heading: Omitted
label: 951 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which directed the Secretary of the Interior to do whatever is necessary and proper to equalize as nearly as possible the values of all allotments of land on the Agua Caliente (Palm Springs) Reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 86–339, § 173 Stat. 602Sept. 21, 1959
Short Title, , , which enacted this subchapter, was popularly known as the “Agua Caliente Equalization Act of 1959”.Pub. L. 86–33973 Stat. 602Sept. 21, 1959
